	lru_cache)
Callable
Optional
PlatformDirsABCc
Windowsa
`MSDN on where to store app data files
    <http://support.microsoft.com/default.aspx?scid=kb;en-us;310294#XSLTH3194121123120121120120>`_.
    Makes use of the
    `appname <platformdirs.api.PlatformDirsABC.appname>`,
    `appauthor <platformdirs.api.PlatformDirsABC.appauthor>`,
    `version <platformdirs.api.PlatformDirsABC.version>`,
    `roaming <platformdirs.api.PlatformDirsABC.roaming>`,
    `opinion <platformdirs.api.PlatformDirsABC.opinion>`.
returnc
        :return: data directory tied to the user, e.g.
         ``%USERPROFILE%\AppData\Local\$appauthor\$appname`` (not roaming) or
         ``%USERPROFILE%\AppData\Roaming\$appauthor\$appname`` (roaming)
        
CSIDL_APPDATA
CSIDL_LOCAL_APPDATA)
roaming
path
normpath
get_win_folder
_append_parts)
self
constr
D/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/pip/_vendor/platformdirs/windows.py
user_data_dir
Windows.user_data_dirN
opinion_value)
appnameZ	appauthor
append
opinion
versionr
join)
paramsZ
authorr
Windows._append_partsc
zT:return: data directory shared by users, e.g. ``C:\ProgramData\$appauthor\$appname``
CSIDL_COMMON_APPDATA
site_data_dir+
Windows.site_data_dirc
zC:return: config directory tied to the user, same as `user_data_dir`
user_config_dir1
Windows.user_config_dirc
zF:return: config directory shared by the users, same as `site_data_dir`)
site_config_dir6
Windows.site_config_dirc
        :return: cache directory tied to the user (if opinionated with ``Cache`` folder within ``$appname``) e.g.
         ``%USERPROFILE%\AppData\Local\$appauthor\$appname\Cache\$version``
        r
Cacher
user_cache_dir;
Windows.user_cache_dirc
zB:return: state directory tied to the user, same as `user_data_dir`r!
user_state_dirD
Windows.user_state_dirc
        :return: log directory tied to the user, same as `user_data_dir` if not opinionated else ``Logs`` in it
        Z
Logs)
user_log_dirI
Windows.user_log_dirc
        :return: documents directory tied to the user e.g. ``%USERPROFILE%\Documents``
        
CSIDL_PERSONAL)
user_documents_dirS
Windows.user_documents_dirc
        :return: runtime directory tied to the user, e.g.
         ``%USERPROFILE%\AppData\Local\Temp\$appauthor\$appname``
        r

Windows.user_runtime_dir)

get_win_folder_from_env_varsd
Get folder from the registry.
    This is a fallback technique at best. I'm not sure if using the
    registry for this guarantees us the correct answer for all CSIDL_*
    names.
    Z
